channel.title: Readies on Fernando Simões
channel.description: Recent content in Readies on Fernando Simões

item.title: A block buffering problem
item.description: A few months back I encountered an interesting behavior: I was trying to debug a legacy Flask API running on Docker. Since I had no time to setup a proper debugger, I began to add print statements to the backend code (don’t judge me, I bet you are lazy too). The problem was: the print output was inconsistent: I tried to reload the React frontend once, and nothing appeared. Then I reload again.
